rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER LLC VS. STEPHANIE GRANT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 13, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT STEPHANIE GRANT MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED subject to (1) Defendant filing and presenting to the Court a courtesy copy of the Proof of Service for the Motion to Vacate; (2) opposition; (3) Defendant posting $6,212 with the Court no later than 2:00 p.m. on March 18, 2019; (4) Defendant filing an answer (after posting) no later than 2:00 p.m. March 18, 2019. =(501/REQ)
